author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 16 APPROVE. Added pub fn running_mean() -> Option<Vec<f64>> and running_var() -> Option<Vec<f64>> to LazyBatchNorm{1,2,3}d via macro extension in lazy_norm.rs. Two internal tests verify materialization-aware semantics (None pre-materialize, Some(non-zero) post-training-forward). Phase 1 parallel BN cross-check intact. ferrotorch-nn: 1195 PASS (was 1193 + 2 new tests), clippy clean.
